    [Documentation](https://developers.booking.com/mcp/booking-connector/about)[Privacy Policy](https://www.booking.com/content/privacy.html)[Support](https://www.booking.com/customer-service.html?aid=8132308)
    

Get your trip started with Booking.com directly on Claude. Search, compare, and find your next stay – from a pet-friendly beach house in Miami to a sleek 5-star hotel near the Eiffel Tower, just ask. Filter by what matters most to you, like price, ratings and facilities. Finding what you're looking for has never been easier. Your ideal stay – just a prompt away.

You can use Booking.com to:

**Find a stay:**  
"Find a 4-star hotel in Lisbon under $200/night for the first weekend of June"

**Compare options:**  
"Show me family-friendly apartments in Barcelona near the beach with a kitchen"

**Plan a trip:**  
"I need a pet-friendly cabin near Lake Tahoe for 4 people next month"
